channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Trump claims upcoming release of government documents related to UFOs

item.title: DPWH engineer testifies on alleged directive linking Revilla to Pandi flood control project
item.description: A Department of Public Works and Highways (DPWH) engineer has testified that a directive from an official identified as Cabral allegedly led to Senator Ramon “Bong” Revilla Jr. being named as the prop...

item.title: Morrisons manager dismissed after intervening in shoplifting incident
item.description: Sean Egan, a store manager at Morrisons in Aldridge near Walsall, has claimed he was dismissed after intervening when a repeated shoplifter became aggressive. Egan, 46, who had worked at the store for...

item.title: Researchers Use Pine Scent to Dramatically Improve Termite Control
item.description: Scientists at the University of California, Riverside, have developed a highly effective approach to controlling western drywood termites by leveraging their natural instincts. Using a compound called...

item.title: Peltola Raises Record $8.9M in Q1 Alaska Senate Race, Trails Sullivan in Cash on Hand
item.description: In the competitive Alaska U.S. Senate race, Democratic challenger Mary Peltola announced she raised nearly $9 million in the first quarter of 2026, setting a record for any Senate campaign in the stat...

item.title: Australian tax burden reaches highest level in nearly two decades amid rising government revenue and borrowing
item.description: New data from the Australian Bureau of Statistics shows that the overall tax burden on Australians has reached its highest level in nearly two decades, returning to levels last seen during the 2007–08...

item.title: Low-dose isotretinoin trend gains popularity in Hollywood despite medical risks
item.description: A growing trend in Hollywood involves the use of low-dose isotretinoin, commonly known as Accutane, as a long-term skincare treatment aimed at improving skin texture and reducing signs of ageing. Ofte...

item.title: PNP reports fewer ordinance violations under Safer Cities Initiative
item.description: The Philippine National Police (PNP) reported a significant decrease in ordinance violations following the launch of the 'Safer Cities Initiative' on April 6, which aims to enhance public order and sa...

item.title: Two fatal domestic violence incidents in Louisiana and Virginia highlight disparities in support for Black communities
item.description: Two recent deadly domestic violence cases in the United States have prompted renewed calls for improved prevention resources and mental health support, particularly within Black communities. In Shreve...

item.title: Analysis Shows Political Violence in South Africa Linked to Elite Struggles Within the ANC
item.description: Recent research suggests that the recurring protests and political violence in South Africa are not solely driven by socio-economic hardship but are strongly influenced by power struggles within the A...

item.title: Former RCMP Officer Denies Allegations of Acting for Chinese Government in Court
item.description: William Majcher, a retired RCMP officer, appeared in British Columbia Supreme Court to plead not guilty to allegations that he acted on behalf of the Chinese government. He is accused of taking prepar...

item.title: Gachagua Warns of Nationwide Protests Over Rising Fuel Prices as Pressure Mounts on Ruto
item.description: So this story is mainly about the rising political pressure on President William Ruto kutokana na high fuel prices and cost of living issues. Former Deputy President Rigathi Gachagua amesema clearly t...

item.title: Cash use in Australia stabilises as digital payments dominate
item.description: After years of steady decline, the use of cash in Australia has shown signs of stabilising and even modest recovery, according to new data from the Reserve Bank. While digital payments surged during t...

item.title: Carroll backs Kieran Foran as Manly’s long-term head coach after strong interim start
item.description: Mark ‘Spudd’ Carroll argues that Manly should stop searching for a new head coach and instead appoint Kieran Foran permanently, following a strong start in his interim role. Initially, Carroll believe...

item.title: Bangladeshi Director Mahde Hasan Examines Urban Life Fragility in 'Sand City'
item.description: Bangladeshi filmmaker Mahde Hasan's debut feature, 'Sand City', is an evocative exploration of urban life in Dhaka through the simple yet symbolic element of sand. The film follows Hassan, who collect...

item.title: Report alleges UK universities hired private firm to monitor student protests and online activity
item.description: A report published by Al Jazeera, based on a joint investigation with Liberty Investigates, has claimed that 12 British universities hired a private intelligence consultancy to monitor student activis...

item.title: IGP Disu reforms police monitoring unit to strengthen accountability, names Aliyu Abubakar as head
item.description: Inspector-General of Police, Tunji Disu, don approve another major restructuring of the Nigeria Police Force Monitoring Unit as part of ongoing efforts to improve accountability and how the police dey...

item.title: Manchester City close gap on Arsenal after 2–1 win, tightening Premier League title race
item.description: Arsenal’s grip on the Premier League title race has weakened after a crucial 2–1 defeat to Manchester City, allowing Pep Guardiola’s side to close the gap to just three points, with a game still in ha...

item.title: Simone Biles urges fans to respect her privacy while attending Laureus World Sports Awards in Madrid
item.description: American gymnast Simone Biles, 29, has publicly requested her fans to respect her privacy following anxiety caused by their presence. The seven-time Olympic gold medallist shared her concerns on Insta...

item.title: EU Age Verification App Hacked in Two Minutes Amid Multiple Security Breaches
item.description: The European Commission's newly released open-source age verification app, intended to help social networks and pornography sites check users' ages without compromising privacy, was quickly exposed as...
